itemListElement.reviewBody:
Worst school,
I have been a student in this school for almost 11 years ,and there are apparently some teachers who are very good and polite, but half of the teachers and especially principal they are interested in student personal life more then there studies. I really like the old summer fields school. And principal only wants her money that's all.
I would recommend that don't go to this school because other students are also have a bad behavior and they use inappropriate languages , they even make fake rumors bout student, if ur child is introvert or a silent type of a person please don't come to this place they probably get traumatized and mentally disturb.

Hello, parents
Avoid going to this school.
The only goal is to take money out of your parents' pockets.
In the classrooms, they treat students the worst. Staff members treat every student with disrespect and hostility. There are no late fees assessed. No notices are given by them. They immediately expel students from the class or even the entire school. It is not a made-up story; it actually occurred to my child and it might also happen to your child. As they treat the students according to their own desires, this will have a negative effect on every student. Because of this type of action from the school employees that the lovely principal ordered, my child has experienced mental harassment because of this . This was the most ridiculous thing, I have seen in my life till now.

Dear Parents
Stay away from this school.
There only motive is to get money from parent's pocket
They treat students worst in the classes. Staff is unprofessional and aggressive with all students. They don't charge for late fees. They don't give any notices. They straight away throw student out of the class or may be out of the school. It is not a made up story this has happened with my child and can happen with your child as well. This will give bad impact on the student as they treat the students as per there own will. My child has been harassed mentally because of this kind of behavior from the school staff ordered by the dearly principal. This was the lamest thing and the worst case scenario i have heard ever till this date of my age.

If you are thinking to admit your child in this school please think twice and ask yourself whether you are a parent or enemy of your child.If your heart says parent then this is not a place for your child.

Secondly a school is known for its education and its highly qualified teachers.But in this school you can see new faces after every 6 months. Wandering why?

Firstly this school is not preferred by the experienced teachers because of inefficient management consisting of their Principal who is not at all experienced in handling the day to day issues happening in school and has a very straight way answer the teachers are responsible for everything.
If I talk about management they have no commitment.They will fail to fulfill their commitment and only you will be held responsible.
They all are greedy for student's fees. They don't give any warnings or late fee charges. They will directly throw your child out of the school without any of the notice. Such greedy behavior from all the teachers and principal itself is very wrong.
Please think twice before admitting your child in such a place like this.

Summer Fields School in Gurugram is a fantastic learning environment that provides students with all the resources and support they need to succeed. The teachers are knowledgeable, passionate, and dedicated to their students' growth. The school places a strong emphasis on character development, instilling values such as respect, responsibility, and leadership in students. The campus is beautiful, and the facilities are state-of-the-art. I have been thoroughly impressed with the quality of education my child has received at Summer Fields School, and I would highly recommend it to anyone looking for an exceptional educational experience.
